title: NR31 0LX, Augean North Sea Services Limited : environmental permit issued - EPR/ZP3637RM/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Augean North Sea Services Limited Installation name: Great Yarmouth Waste Management Resource Centre Permit number: EPR/ZP3637RM/V003  "
